/usr/bin/g++ -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/comm_libs/12.6/nvshmem/lib -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/comm_libs/12.6/hpcx/hpcx-2.20/ompi/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread @CMakeFiles/cg_mustard.dir/objects1.rsp CMakeFiles/cg_mustard.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o ../cg_mustard @CMakeFiles/cg_mustard.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/comm_libs/12.6/nvshmem/lib" -L"/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/cuda/12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/cuda/12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib" -lnvshmem_host -lnvshmem_device -lcuda
